---
name: "\U0001F41B Bug report"
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

```bash
# Command that caused the bug
dt <command>
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include error output, unexpected results, etc.).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node version: `node --version`
- Package version: `dt --version` (or `npx devkits --version`)
- Installation method: `npm install -g devkits` / `npx devkits` / other

## Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots here.
